name: Brownie Bottom Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Unsweetened baking chocolate, 4 squares (1 oz each)
Cream cheese, softened, 3 packages (8 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9-inch springform pan and set aside.
3. Prepare the cake: Melt butter and chocolate in a heavy saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly until mixture is lukewarm. Add sugar and eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in milk and vanilla. Stir in combined flour and salt, mixing just until blended. Spoon batter into prepared springform pan and spread evenly.
4. Bake for 25 minutes.
5. Remove cake from oven while preparing the topping.
6. Prepare the topping: Beat cream cheese and vanilla with an electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in sour cream; pour over brownie bottom (filling will almost come to the top of the pan).
7. Bake for 55 to 60 minutes or until center is nearly set.
8. Run knife or metal spatula around rim of pan to loosen cake. Cool before removing rim of pan. Refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight. Let stand at room temperature for 30 minutes before serving. Makes 12 servings.
